economic_ownership_map.label: Consulting and managed-services owner-cash engine
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Global consulting and managed-services normalized free cash flow

low.label: FY2025 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2025 payments to acquire property, plant and equipment
FY2025 diluted shares (net income / diluted EPS)
Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
low.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share; business optimization charges already in reported OCF.

low.label: Growth years 1–5
low.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth from valuation.json.

low.label: Required return on owner cash
low.rationale: Premium compounder bounds; not the stance gate.

low.label: Selling multiple in year 7
low.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 14× / 16× / 19× on year-10 cash path.

low.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
low.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 FCF per share.

low.label: cash_pv
low.formula: present_value(owner_cash_y1, 1, owner_cash_y2, 2, owner_cash_y3, 3, owner_cash_y4, 4, owner_cash_y5, 5, owner_cash_y6, 6, discount_rate)

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Primary bridge from ACN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251010_rpt20250831_acc0001467373_25_000217.htm: FY2025 revenue $69673.0M, OCF $11470.0M, FCF $10870.0M, cash $11478.7M, debt $5034.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Business optimization charges already in OCF; managed-services mix shift supports base growth.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: Generative AI reinvention and managed-services upside option
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Incremental enterprise Gen AI reinvention monetization beyond normalized FCF

low.label: Risk-adjusted Gen AI reinvention and managed-services upside
low.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on enterprise Gen AI reinvention spend beyond normalized FCF engine; Q2 FY2026 bookings stabilization supports base band.

low.label: Gen AI reinvention option per share

base.label: Risk-adjusted Gen AI reinvention and managed-services upside
base.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on enterprise Gen AI reinvention spend beyond normalized FCF engine; Q2 FY2026 bookings stabilization supports base band.

base.label: Gen AI reinvention option per share

high.label: Risk-adjusted Gen AI reinvention and managed-services upside
high.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on enterprise Gen AI reinvention spend beyond normalized FCF engine; Q2 FY2026 bookings stabilization supports base band.

high.label: Gen AI reinvention option per share

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Primary bridge from ACN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251010_rpt20250831_acc0001467373_25_000217.htm: FY2025 revenue $69673.0M, OCF $11470.0M, FCF $10870.0M, cash $11478.7M, debt $5034.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Enterprise reinvention programs convert over 3–5 years per FY2025 10-K disclosures.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~45% that Gen AI reinvention sustains mid-single-digit bookings growth; low case zero.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: $3B Gen AI investment since 2023; ~$1B remaining run-rate in proof judgment band.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Not in Lawrence base FCF path; Q2 FY2026 bookings stabilization supports base band.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Net corporate liquidity after long-term debt and operating minimum

low.label: Long-term debt and capital lease obligations
Cash required for global payroll and working capital
low.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable operating liquidity for ~779K employees.

low.label: Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating minimum
low.rationale: Filing-locked cash less long-term debt; low stresses trapped liquidity and refinancing.

base.label: Long-term debt and capital lease obligations
Cash required for global payroll and working capital
base.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable operating liquidity for ~779K employees.

high.rationale: Filing-locked cash less long-term debt; low stresses trapped liquidity and refinancing.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Generative AI reinvention and managed-services upside option
IT spending cycle and AI labor-substitution stress reserve
Net cash and debt claims on common equity

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
